case_title: CACH, LLC VS. LUZ ERLINDA CISNEROS et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED AUG-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA
DECLARATION RYAN E. BOS FILED RE: CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION RYAN E. VOS FILED RE: CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION RYAN E. VOS FILED RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION CATHERINE POTTS FILED RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA $1,582.33 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $161.68 INTEREST, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,410.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $44.90 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, LUZ ERLINDA
